scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const dest='../electron2.1/backend_src'; if(fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.rmSync(dest, {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('src', dest, {recursive:true}); console.log('Backend files successfully synced to Electron.');"
